name: microstarplatform
description: MicroStarPlatform — Azure-native PWA for daily micro-achievements (DMTA → STAR)

scripts.dev:swa: echo "SWA CLI: install @azure/static-web-apps-cli globally, then run swa start"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @microstar/shared build && node scripts/write-architecture-mock.mjs && pnpm -r --filter !@microstar/shared build
